---
title: "MinotauR outreach"
format: html
---

## Overview

Welcome to the MinotauR outreach platform! Here you will find presentations and
other learning material about the MinotauR ecosystem. For detailed information
about a particular package, visit the corresponding package web pages.

## Contents

- [ariadne](https://Minotau-R.github.io/outreach/ariadne.html){target="_blank"}

Need some help? Just [open an issue](https://github.com/Minotau-R/outreach/issues/new)
and you'll hear back from us!
